none.name: Push-up
steps: Start in a high plank, hands under shoulders
Lower your chest to the floor, elbows at ~45°
Push back up to full arm extension
mistakes: Letting hips sag or pike up
Flaring elbows straight out to the sides
tips: Keep your core tight the whole rep
Squeeze glutes to keep the body in a straight line

none.name: Incline Push-up
steps: Place hands on a bench or sturdy elevated surface
Lower chest toward the surface
Push back up to start
mistakes: Using a surface too high, making it too easy
tips: Lower the incline over time as you get stronger
Keep elbows tucked at about 45°

none.name: Squats
steps: Stand feet shoulder-width apart
Sit hips back and down, chest up
Push through heels to stand back up
mistakes: Knees caving inward
Heels lifting off the floor
tips: Keep weight in your heels and mid-foot
Go as deep as your mobility allows with good form

none.name: Reverse Lunge
steps: Step one leg back, lowering the back knee toward the floor
Keep front knee over ankle
Push through front heel to return to start
mistakes: Letting the front knee travel past the toes excessively
Leaning torso too far forward
tips: Keep most of your weight on the front leg
Move slowly to build stability

none.name: Walking Lunge
steps: Step forward into a lunge, back knee toward the floor
Push off the back foot and step through to the next lunge
Alternate legs as you move forward
mistakes: Short, choppy steps that limit range of motion
tips: Take a step long enough for both knees near 90°
Keep your torso upright

none.name: Glute Bridges
steps: Lie on your back, knees bent, feet flat
Drive through heels to lift hips up
Squeeze glutes at the top, then lower
mistakes: Overarching the lower back at the top
tips: Think 'tuck the pelvis' slightly at the top to isolate glutes
Pause 1 second at the top

none.name: Single-leg Glute Bridge
steps: Lie on your back, one knee bent and foot flat, other leg extended
Drive through the planted heel to lift hips
Lower with control and repeat
mistakes: Letting hips rotate or tilt to one side
tips: Keep hips square and level throughout
Start with a smaller range of motion if it's new to you

none.name: Side Leg Raises
steps: Lie on your side, legs stacked, body in a straight line
Raise your top leg up toward the ceiling
Lower with control and repeat
mistakes: Rolling the hips backward to swing the leg higher
tips: Keep hips stacked and core braced throughout
Lead with your heel, not your toes

none.name: Plank
steps: Forearms and toes on the floor, body in a straight line
Brace your core
Hold the position for the set duration
mistakes: Hips sagging low or piking up high
tips: Squeeze glutes and quads to help maintain a straight line
Breathe steadily, don't hold your breath

none.name: Side Plank
steps: Lie on your side, prop up on one forearm
Lift hips so body forms a straight line
Hold, keeping hips stacked
mistakes: Letting hips drop toward the floor
tips: Stack feet or stagger them for more stability
Look straight ahead to keep neck neutral

none.name: Dead Bug
steps: Lie on back, arms up, knees bent at 90°
Lower one arm and the opposite leg toward the floor
Return to start and alternate sides
mistakes: Lower back arching off the floor
tips: Press your low back into the floor the whole time
Move slowly and with control

none.name: Bird Dog
steps: Start on hands and knees
Extend one arm and the opposite leg out straight
Hold briefly, return, then switch sides
mistakes: Rotating or dipping the hips as you extend
tips: Keep hips and shoulders square to the floor
Move slowly rather than swinging the limbs

none.name: Mountain Climber
steps: Start in a high plank
Drive one knee toward your chest, then switch quickly
Keep alternating at a controlled, steady pace
mistakes: Hips bouncing up and down instead of staying level
tips: Keep shoulders stacked over wrists
Start slower and build up speed with good form

none.name: Superman
steps: Lie face down, arms extended overhead
Lift arms, chest, and legs off the floor together
Hold briefly, then lower with control
mistakes: Yanking the neck back to look up
tips: Keep your gaze down at the floor to protect your neck
Focus on squeezing glutes and back muscles

none.name: Pike Push-up
steps: Start in a downward-dog-like pike position, hands and feet on floor
Bend elbows to lower head toward the floor
Push back up to start
mistakes: Flattening the hips out into a normal push-up position
tips: Keep hips high throughout to target shoulders
Walk feet closer to hands for a steeper angle

none.name: Bench Dip
steps: Hands on a bench behind you, legs extended out
Lower your body by bending elbows
Push back up to full extension
mistakes: Letting shoulders roll forward under strain
tips: Keep elbows pointing backward, not flared out
Bend knees to make it easier if needed

none.name: Heel Taps
steps: Lie on your back, knees bent, feet flat, hands by your sides
Crunch up slightly and reach one hand to tap the same-side heel
Lower and alternate sides
mistakes: Pulling with the neck instead of crunching from the core
tips: Keep the lift small and controlled
Keep your lower back pressed toward the floor

bands.name: Chest Press
steps: Anchor band behind you at chest height
Press handles forward until arms are extended
Return with control
mistakes: Locking elbows aggressively at the end
tips: Keep a slight bend in the elbow at full extension
Exhale as you press

bands.name: Row
steps: Anchor band in front of you at chest height
Pull handles toward your ribs, squeezing shoulder blades
Return with control
mistakes: Using momentum instead of controlled pulling
tips: Keep elbows close to your body
Pause briefly at full contraction

bands.name: Pulldown
steps: Anchor band overhead
Pull handles down toward your shoulders
Return with control to full stretch
mistakes: Leaning back excessively to generate momentum
tips: Keep your torso upright
Focus on driving elbows down and back

bands.name: Shoulder Press
steps: Stand on the band, handles at shoulder height
Press overhead until arms are extended
Lower with control
mistakes: Arching the lower back to press higher
tips: Keep core braced throughout
Press slightly forward, not straight up, if that feels more natural

bands.name: Lateral Raise
steps: Stand on band, handle in one hand
Raise arm out to the side to shoulder height
Lower with control
mistakes: Shrugging the shoulder up toward the ear
tips: Lead with your elbow, not your hand
Keep a slight bend in the elbow

bands.name: Front Raise
steps: Stand on band, handle in one or both hands
Raise arm(s) straight in front to shoulder height
Lower with control
mistakes: Swinging the torso to help lift the arm
tips: Keep movement slow and controlled
Avoid raising past shoulder height

bands.name: Face Pull
steps: Anchor band at face height
Pull handles toward your face, elbows high
Return with control
mistakes: Pulling low toward the chest instead of the face
tips: Focus on squeezing shoulder blades together
Keep elbows above wrist height

bands.name: Bicep Curl
steps: Stand on band, arms at sides
Curl handles up toward shoulders
Lower with control
mistakes: Swinging elbows forward during the curl
tips: Keep elbows pinned to your sides
Squeeze at the top of the curl

bands.name: Hammer Curl
steps: Stand on band, palms facing each other
Curl handles up keeping wrists neutral
Lower with control
mistakes: Rotating wrists during the movement
tips: Keep thumbs pointing up throughout
Move slowly on the way down

bands.name: Tricep Pushdown
steps: Anchor band overhead
Push handles down until arms are extended
Return with control
mistakes: Letting elbows drift away from the body
tips: Keep elbows tucked at your sides
Focus on squeezing triceps at the bottom

bands.name: Overhead Extension
steps: Anchor band behind you, hold handle overhead
Extend arm straight up
Bend elbow to lower with control
mistakes: Letting the elbow flare out to the side
tips: Keep elbow close to your head
Move slowly through the full range

bands.name: Squat
steps: Stand on band, handles at shoulders or hips
Squat down keeping chest up
Push through heels to stand
mistakes: Losing tension in the band at the bottom
tips: Keep constant tension on the band throughout
Keep knees tracking over toes

bands.name: Romanian Deadlift
steps: Stand on band, handles at hip level
Hinge at hips, pushing them back, slight knee bend
Drive hips forward to return to standing
mistakes: Rounding the lower back during the hinge
tips: Keep a flat back and soft knees
Feel the stretch in your hamstrings, not your lower back

bands.name: Glute Kickback
steps: Anchor band at ankle height, loop around one ankle
Kick leg straight back, squeezing glute
Return with control
mistakes: Arching the lower back to kick higher
tips: Keep the movement coming from the hip, not the back
Pause briefly at full extension

bands.name: Hip Abduction
steps: Loop band around ankles or above knees
Step or raise leg out to the side
Return with control
mistakes: Leaning the torso to compensate for the movement
tips: Keep hips and torso stable and upright
Move slowly to keep tension on the band

barbell.name: Back Squat
steps: Bar rests across upper back, feet shoulder-width
Sit hips back and down, chest tall
Drive through heels to stand
mistakes: Knees caving inward
Rounding the lower back at the bottom
tips: Brace your core hard before descending
Keep the bar path vertical over mid-foot

barbell.name: Bench Press
steps: Lie on bench, grip bar slightly wider than shoulders
Lower bar to mid-chest
Press back up to full extension
mistakes: Bouncing the bar off the chest
tips: Keep feet planted and a slight arch in your back
Control the bar down for 2-3 seconds

barbell.name: Close-grip Bench Press
steps: Lie on bench, grip bar shoulder-width or slightly narrower
Lower bar to chest, elbows close to body
Press back up
mistakes: Gripping too narrow, causing wrist strain
tips: Keep elbows tucked but not pinned to your sides
Focus on triceps driving the press

barbell.name: Bicep Curl
steps: Stand holding bar, palms facing forward
Curl bar up toward shoulders
Lower with control
mistakes: Swinging the torso to heave the weight up
tips: Keep elbows fixed at your sides
Squeeze biceps hard at the top

barbell.name: Deadlift
steps: Stand with bar over mid-foot, grip just outside legs
Hinge and bend knees to grip bar, chest up
Drive through floor to stand tall
mistakes: Rounding the lower back
Letting the bar drift away from the body
tips: Keep the bar close, dragging up the shins
Brace your core hard before lifting

barbell.name: Front Squat
steps: Bar rests on front shoulders, elbows high
Sit hips down keeping torso upright
Drive through heels to stand
mistakes: Letting elbows drop, causing the bar to roll forward
tips: Keep elbows pointed up throughout
Stay more upright than in a back squat

barbell.name: Hip Thrust
steps: Upper back on a bench, bar across hips
Drive hips up until torso is parallel to floor
Lower with control
mistakes: Overextending and arching the lower back at the top
tips: Tuck chin slightly and squeeze glutes hard at the top
Keep ribs down, avoid flaring them out

barbell.name: Incline Bench Press
steps: Set bench to an incline, grip bar slightly wider than shoulders
Lower bar to upper chest
Press back up
mistakes: Setting the incline too steep, turning it into a shoulder press
tips: A 30-45° incline usually targets upper chest best
Keep shoulder blades pulled back and down

barbell.name: Overhead Press
steps: Bar at shoulder height, grip just outside shoulders
Press bar straight overhead
Lower with control back to shoulders
mistakes: Arching the lower back excessively to press
tips: Brace your core and squeeze glutes for stability
Move your head back slightly as the bar passes your face

barbell.name: Romanian Deadlift
steps: Hold bar at hip level, slight knee bend
Hinge hips back, lowering bar along your legs
Drive hips forward to return to standing
mistakes: Rounding the back or bending the knees too much
tips: Keep the bar close to your legs the whole time
Feel a stretch in your hamstrings, not your back

dumbbells.name: Arnold Press
steps: Hold dumbbells at shoulder height, palms facing you
Press up while rotating palms to face forward
Reverse the rotation on the way down
mistakes: Rushing the rotation instead of controlling it
tips: Keep the movement slow and smooth
Brace your core to avoid arching your back

dumbbells.name: Bench Press
steps: Lie on bench, dumbbell in each hand at chest level
Press dumbbells up until arms extended
Lower with control
mistakes: Letting dumbbells drift too wide or too narrow
tips: Keep wrists stacked over elbows
Control the descent for 2-3 seconds

dumbbells.name: Bent-over Row
steps: Hinge at hips, back flat, dumbbell in each hand
Pull dumbbells toward your ribs
Lower with control
mistakes: Rounding the back to pull heavier weight
tips: Keep elbows close to your body
Lead with your elbows, not your hands

dumbbells.name: Bicep Curl
steps: Stand holding dumbbells at sides, palms forward
Curl weights up toward shoulders
Lower with control
mistakes: Swinging the weights using momentum
tips: Keep elbows fixed at your sides
Squeeze at the top of each rep

dumbbells.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
steps: Rear foot elevated on a bench, front foot forward
Lower back knee toward the floor
Push through front heel to stand
mistakes: Placing the front foot too close, limiting depth
tips: Keep most of your weight on the front leg
Keep torso upright throughout

dumbbells.name: Calf Raises
steps: Stand holding dumbbells at your sides
Rise up onto your toes
Lower with control below start position
mistakes: Rushing through reps without a full range of motion
tips: Pause briefly at the top
Use a step for extra range if available

dumbbells.name: Chest Fly
steps: Lie on bench, dumbbells above chest, slight elbow bend
Lower arms out to the sides in an arc
Bring dumbbells back together above chest
mistakes: Bending elbows too much, turning it into a press
tips: Keep a soft, fixed bend in the elbows throughout
Focus on stretching the chest at the bottom

dumbbells.name: Concentration Curl
steps: Sit, elbow braced against inner thigh, dumbbell in hand
Curl weight up toward shoulder
Lower with control
mistakes: Letting the elbow drift off the thigh
tips: Keep the elbow anchored throughout the rep
Focus on a slow, controlled squeeze

dumbbells.name: Deadlift
steps: Hold dumbbells in front of thighs
Hinge hips back, lowering weights along your legs
Drive hips forward to stand tall
mistakes: Rounding the lower back
tips: Keep dumbbells close to your legs
Brace your core before each rep

dumbbells.name: Floor Press
steps: Lie on the floor, knees bent, dumbbells at chest
Press up until arms extended
Lower until upper arms touch the floor
mistakes: Slamming elbows into the floor
tips: Lower with control until triceps gently touch down
Keep wrists stacked over elbows

dumbbells.name: Front Raise
steps: Stand holding dumbbells in front of thighs
Raise arms straight in front to shoulder height
Lower with control
mistakes: Using momentum by swinging the torso
tips: Move slowly and avoid raising past shoulder height
Keep a slight bend in the elbows

dumbbells.name: Goblet Squat
steps: Hold one dumbbell vertically at chest
Squat down keeping chest up
Push through heels to stand
mistakes: Letting elbows and knees collapse inward
tips: Use your elbows to gently push knees out at the bottom
Keep the dumbbell close to your chest

dumbbells.name: Hammer Curl
steps: Stand holding dumbbells, palms facing each other
Curl weights up keeping wrists neutral
Lower with control
mistakes: Rotating the wrists during the curl
tips: Keep thumbs pointing up the whole time
Keep elbows fixed at your sides

dumbbells.name: Incline Press
steps: Set bench to an incline, dumbbells at shoulder height
Press up until arms extended
Lower with control
mistakes: Setting the incline too steep
tips: A 30-45° incline works best for upper chest
Keep shoulder blades pulled back

dumbbells.name: Lateral Raise
steps: Stand holding dumbbells at sides
Raise arms out to the sides to shoulder height
Lower with control
mistakes: Shrugging shoulders up toward the ears
tips: Lead with your elbows
Use lighter weight to maintain good form

dumbbells.name: Lunges
steps: Hold dumbbells at your sides
Step forward, lowering back knee toward floor
Push back to standing and repeat
mistakes: Letting the front knee travel too far past the toes
tips: Keep torso upright
Keep most weight in your front heel

dumbbells.name: One-arm Row
steps: One hand and knee on a bench, other foot on floor
Pull dumbbell toward your hip
Lower with control
mistakes: Rotating the torso to help lift the weight
tips: Keep your back flat and torso still
Lead with your elbow, squeezing your back at the top

dumbbells.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
steps: Hold one dumbbell overhead with both hands
Lower it behind your head by bending elbows
Extend back up to start
mistakes: Letting elbows flare out wide
tips: Keep elbows pointing forward, close to your head
Move slowly through the full range

dumbbells.name: Tricep Extension
steps: Hold a dumbbell in one hand, arm raised overhead
Bend the elbow to lower the weight behind your head
Extend back up to start
mistakes: Letting the elbow flare out to the side
tips: Keep your elbow pointed forward, close to your head
Move slowly through the full range

dumbbells.name: Rear Delt Fly
steps: Hinge forward at hips, dumbbells hanging down
Raise arms out to the sides, squeezing shoulder blades
Lower with control
mistakes: Using momentum by jerking the weights up
tips: Keep a slight bend in the elbows throughout
Focus on squeezing your upper back at the top

dumbbells.name: Renegade Row
steps: Start in a plank holding dumbbells
Row one dumbbell up toward your hip
Lower and repeat on the other side
mistakes: Letting hips rotate side to side
tips: Keep hips square and core braced
Widen your feet for more stability

dumbbells.name: Romanian Deadlift
steps: Hold dumbbells in front of thighs, slight knee bend
Hinge hips back, lowering weights along legs
Drive hips forward to stand
mistakes: Rounding the back during the hinge
tips: Keep dumbbells close to your legs
Feel the stretch in your hamstrings

dumbbells.name: Shoulder Press
steps: Hold dumbbells at shoulder height
Press overhead until arms extended
Lower with control
mistakes: Arching the lower back to press
tips: Brace your core throughout
Avoid clanging dumbbells together at the top

dumbbells.name: Skull Crushers
steps: Lie on bench, dumbbells extended above chest
Bend elbows to lower weights toward your forehead
Extend back up
mistakes: Letting elbows flare outward
tips: Keep elbows pointed at the ceiling throughout
Move slowly to protect your elbows

dumbbells.name: Step-up
steps: Hold dumbbells at sides, one foot on a bench or box
Drive through that foot to step up fully
Step back down with control
mistakes: Pushing off the back leg instead of the front
tips: Drive through the heel of the top foot
Choose a box height you can control

dumbbells.name: Walking Lunges
steps: Hold dumbbells at sides
Step forward into a lunge, back knee toward floor
Push off and step through into the next lunge
mistakes: Taking steps too short, limiting range of motion
tips: Take a stride long enough for both knees near 90°
Keep your torso tall throughout

full_gym.name: Assisted Pull-up
steps: Set assistance weight, kneel on the pad
Pull chest up toward the bar
Lower with control to full stretch
mistakes: Using too much assistance, avoiding real effort
tips: Lower the assistance over time as you get stronger
Focus on pulling with your back, not just your arms

full_gym.name: Cable Curl
steps: Stand facing the low pulley, grip the bar or handle
Curl toward your shoulders
Lower with control
mistakes: Leaning back to use momentum
tips: Keep elbows fixed at your sides
Constant cable tension makes this great for a strict curl

full_gym.name: Cable Face Pull
steps: Set pulley to face height, grip rope attachment
Pull toward your face, elbows high
Return with control
mistakes: Pulling low toward the chest
tips: Squeeze shoulder blades together at the end
Keep elbows above wrist height

full_gym.name: Cable Fly
steps: Set pulleys to chest height, grip a handle in each hand
Bring hands together in front of chest in an arc
Return with control
mistakes: Bending elbows too much, turning it into a press
tips: Keep a soft, fixed elbow bend throughout
Focus on squeezing your chest at the finish

full_gym.name: Cable Lateral Raise
steps: Stand side-on to a low pulley, grip the handle
Raise arm out to the side to shoulder height
Lower with control
mistakes: Shrugging the shoulder up toward the ear
tips: Lead with your elbow
Cable keeps tension on the whole rep, unlike dumbbells

full_gym.name: Cable Pushdown
steps: Grip bar or rope at a high pulley
Push down until arms extended
Return with control
mistakes: Letting elbows drift away from the body
tips: Keep elbows tucked at your sides
Squeeze triceps hard at the bottom

full_gym.name: Chest Press Machine
steps: Adjust seat so handles are at chest height
Press handles forward until arms extended
Return with control
mistakes: Using a seat height that's too high or low
tips: Set the seat so handles align with mid-chest
Keep shoulder blades pressed into the pad

full_gym.name: Hamstring Curl
steps: Lie face down or seated, pad against lower legs
Curl legs toward your glutes
Lower with control
mistakes: Lifting hips off the pad to cheat the weight up
tips: Keep hips pressed down throughout
Squeeze hamstrings at the top of the curl

full_gym.name: Hip Abduction Machine
steps: Sit with legs against the pads
Push legs outward against resistance
Return with control
mistakes: Using a fast, jerky motion
tips: Move slowly to keep the glutes working
Lean slightly forward for a stronger glute focus

full_gym.name: Hip Adduction Machine
steps: Sit with legs against the pads, spread apart
Squeeze legs together against resistance
Return with control
mistakes: Using momentum instead of a controlled squeeze
tips: Pause briefly at full contraction
Keep the movement slow and controlled

full_gym.name: Lat Pulldown
steps: Grip the bar wider than shoulder-width, sit with thighs secured
Pull bar down to upper chest
Return with control to full stretch
mistakes: Leaning back excessively to use momentum
tips: Keep your torso mostly upright
Focus on driving elbows down and back

full_gym.name: Leg Extension
steps: Sit with pad resting on lower shins
Extend legs until straight
Lower with control
mistakes: Using a fast, kicking motion
tips: Squeeze quads at the top of each rep
Control the weight on the way down

full_gym.name: Leg Press
steps: Sit in machine, feet shoulder-width on the platform
Lower platform by bending knees toward chest
Press back up to start without locking knees
mistakes: Letting knees cave inward
Locking knees out fully at the top
tips: Keep knees tracking in line with your toes
Avoid letting your lower back round at the bottom

full_gym.name: Pec Deck Fly
steps: Sit with arms resting on the pads
Bring pads together in front of your chest
Return with control
mistakes: Using a jerky, fast motion to swing the weight
tips: Move slowly and squeeze at the peak
Keep shoulder blades pressed back into the seat

full_gym.name: Row Machine
steps: Sit with chest against the pad, grip the handles
Pull handles toward your torso
Return with control
mistakes: Rounding the back to pull more weight
tips: Keep chest against the pad throughout
Squeeze shoulder blades together at the finish

full_gym.name: Seated Cable Row
steps: Sit with feet on platform, grip the handle
Pull handle toward your torso, chest up
Return with control to a full stretch
mistakes: Leaning back too far and using momentum
tips: Keep your torso mostly upright
Lead with your elbows, squeezing shoulder blades together

smith_machine.name: Smith Machine Bench Press
steps: Lie on bench under the bar, unrack it
Lower bar to mid-chest
Press back up to full extension
mistakes: Setting the bench too far forward or back from the bar path
tips: The fixed bar path means you can focus purely on pressing power
Keep feet planted and a slight arch in your back

smith_machine.name: Smith Machine Shoulder Press
steps: Sit or stand under the bar at shoulder height, unrack it
Press bar straight overhead
Lower with control back to shoulders
mistakes: Arching the lower back excessively to press
tips: Brace your core throughout
The fixed path helps you focus on pure vertical pressing

smith_machine.name: Smith Machine Squat
steps: Bar across upper back, unrack it, feet slightly forward of the bar
Sit hips back and down
Drive through heels to stand
mistakes: Positioning feet directly under the bar, causing knee strain
tips: Step feet slightly ahead of the bar path for a more natural squat
Keep core braced throughout

gym.name: Brisk walk or incline treadmill
gym.detail: 2–3 minutes — comfortable pace that gets you slightly warm.

gym.name: Arm circles
gym.detail: 10 forward + 10 backward — small circles first, then larger ones.

gym.name: Hip circles
gym.detail: 10 each direction — hands on hips, slow controlled circles.

gym.name: Bodyweight Squats
gym.detail: 10 reps — controlled movement, full range of motion.

gym.name: Walking Lunges
gym.detail: 8 each leg — focus on balance and opening the hips. (Use reverse lunges if space is limited.)

gym.name: Cat-Cow Stretch
gym.detail: 8 reps — great for warming up your spine before lifting.

gym.name: Glute Bridges
gym.detail: 10–15 reps — pause 1 second at the top and squeeze your glutes.

home.name: March in Place
home.detail: 1 minute — swing your arms and gradually lift your knees higher.

home.name: Jumping Jacks
home.detail: 30–45 seconds — use step jacks for a low-impact option.

home.name: Glute Bridges
home.detail: 12 reps — squeeze at the top for 1 second.

home.name: Bird Dogs
home.detail: 8 reps per side — keep your hips level and move slowly.

home.name: Reverse Lunges
home.detail: 6 reps per leg — just enough to wake up your legs and improve balance.

exercises.name: Brisk walk or incline treadmill
exercises.detail: 2–3 minutes — comfortable pace that gets you slightly warm.

exercises.name: Arm circles
exercises.detail: 10 forward + 10 backward — small circles first, then larger ones.

exercises.name: Hip circles
exercises.detail: 10 each direction — hands on hips, slow controlled circles.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercises.detail: 10 reps — controlled movement, full range of motion.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.detail: 8 each leg — focus on balance and opening the hips.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow Stretch
exercises.detail: 8 reps — great for warming up your spine before lifting.

exercises.name: Glute Bridges
exercises.detail: 10–15 reps — pause 1 second at the top and squeeze your glutes.
